metadata.description: Kanban board for 30-Day Free Trial Management System. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: 30-Day Free Trial Management System
tasks.description: Implement trial period tracking, trial expiration handling, payment collection prompts, and trial-to-paid conversion workflow.
tasks.userStory: As a prospective store owner, I want to try the platform for 30 days without payment so that I can evaluate the platform before committing to a subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a new account is created, when the account is activated, then a 30-day trial period starts automatically
Given a user is in trial, when they access the platform, then they see their trial status and days remaining
Given a trial is expiring in 7 days, when the user logs in, then they receive a notification to add payment method
Given a trial expires, when payment method is on file, then subscription billing begins automatically
Given a trial expires, when no payment method is on file, then access is restricted and user is prompted to add payment
Given a trial user, when they add payment method during trial, then it is stored but not charged until trial ends
Given a trial expires, when user doesn't add payment within 7 days, then account is suspended and data is retained for 30 days
tasks.businessValue: Reduces barrier to entry and increases customer acquisition. Allows stores to experience value before paying.
tasks.technicalNotes: Track trial start date and expiration date. Implement scheduled jobs to check trial status. Send email notifications at 7 days, 3 days, and 1 day before expiration.
successMetrics: Trial-to-paid conversion rate: 40%+ of trials convert to paid subscriptions
Payment setup before trial end: 60%+ of converting users add payment before trial expires
businessRules: Trial period is exactly 30 days from account activation
No payment required during trial period
Payment method must be added before trial ends for subscription to continue
Trial cannot be extended or restarted
All features are available during trial period
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
